ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Loyalty status of the customer (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the customer */,
  "anniversary_date" TEXT /* Anniversary date of the customer (if applicable) */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "average_spend" TEXT /* Average amount spent by the customer */,
  "communication_preferences" TEXT /* Customer's communication preferences (e.g., email, SMS, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount applied to the transaction */,
  "difference" TEXT /* Difference in the transaction amount after discount */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending, Canceled) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel of the transaction (e.g., Online, In-store, Mobile) */,
  "items" TEXT /* List of items purchased (JSON or foreign key to an items table) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address if different from the customer's address */,
  "discount_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount code used (if any) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who processed the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_discount_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_code_id") REFERENCES discount_codes ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to achieve the loyalty status */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered by the loyalty program */,
  "reward_threshold" INTEGER /* Points required to earn a reward */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "lifetime_value" TEXT /* Lifetime value of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_loyalty" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loyalty program */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the customer enrolled in the loyalty program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Points redeemed by the customer */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Current loyalty status of the customer */,
  "next_status_points" INTEGER /* Points required to reach the next loyalty status */,
  "last_status_change_date" TEXT /* Date the loyalty status was last changed */,
  "lifetime_points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the customer since joining the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discount_codes" (
  "code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount code */,
  "code_value" TEXT /* Value of the discount code */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of the discount (e.g., Percentage, Fixed Amount) */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage or fixed amount of the discount */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date the discount code becomes valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date the discount code expires */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the code can be used */,
  "used_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the code has been used */,
  "minimum_spend" TEXT /* Minimum spend required to use the discount code */,
  "maximum_discount" TEXT /* Maximum discount amount that can be applied */,
  "redeemable_channels" TEXT /* Channels where the code is redeemable (e.g., Online, In-store, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Sales Associate, Manager, Analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user (JSON or foreign key to a permissions table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
